proposed_relations.description: SBS results show 15-20% speed improvement across corridors, cited in Webster SBS CAC presentation

rationale: p004_c0002 presents general SBS speed results in the Webster Avenue SBS CAC presentation to build support for the project. The project_12-webster-ave record includes this source.

quarantine.note: The cited block p004_c0002 ('Speed: 15-20% faster') is a general SBS program-wide metric, not a metric of the Webster Avenue SBS project. The metric record itself confirms this with description 'SBS speed improvement results across corridors.' Co-occurrence in a Webster Avenue SBS presentation does not establish a has_metric relation to project_12-webster-ave.
